---
name: Bug Report
about: Report something that isn't working correctly
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
---

## Describe the bug

A clear description of what went wrong.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Run `./install.sh`
2. Select categories '...'
3. See error at '...'

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Include any error messages.

## Environment

- **OS:** (e.g., Ubuntu 24.04, Debian 12, Linux Mint 22)
- **Architecture:** (x86_64 / aarch64)
- **Terminal:** (e.g., Kitty, GNOME Terminal, Alacritty)
- **ShellMint version:** (run `./install.sh --version`)
- **Running in Docker?** Yes / No

## Log output

Paste the relevant section from `~/.shellmint-install.log`:

```
paste log lines here
```

## Additional context

Any other information that might help (screenshots, related issues, etc.).
